checks.observed: Unauthed GET / redirected to /he/auth/login with email field and submit button visible.
Minted magic-link session landed on /he dashboard with streak, score, and topic widgets; no login loop.
Dashboard showed streak 3, score 3010, four seeded topics with numeric progress (e.g. הכרת הרכב 6/106).
Hebrew RTL UI with no raw i18n keys; html dir=rtl lang=he confirmed.
Vehicle topic quiz loaded at question 7/106 with heading, four answer buttons, and quiz container present.
Answer select, confirm, and feedback loop worked; counter advanced 7→8→9; correct and wrong feedback text shown.
Every confirmed answer issued POST /api/quiz with HTTP 200; no 4xx/5xx in network log.
Final screen UI verified on completed traffic-laws topic (501/501, home + review links); POST /api/progress not observed because vehicle session could not be finished (78 questions remain).
checks.reason: Could not complete a full quiz session within timebox to trigger POST /api/progress

checks.observed: Dashboard vehicle progress increased from 6/106 to 28/106 and score from 3010 to 3060 after quiz answers.
After clearing localStorage, vehicle quiz resumed at 9/106 (server progress) instead of question 1.
Mid-quiz reload restored slide index 8 in quiz-resume:v1 localStorage and resumed at question 9/106.
No error-level console entries across login, dashboard, and quiz flow; only dev preload warnings.
Headings present per page; answer buttons expose accessible names including תשובה נכונה/שגויה; feedback also in live region text.
Visible strings match Hebrew Home/Quiz namespaces; RTL layout intact with no English leakage in flow.

not_tested: Email OTP send-otp path (auth was minted)

POST /api/progress on live quiz completion (blocked by remaining question count)
